## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / chore
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] 🧪 Test only
- [ ] 🎨 Visual change (screenshots required below)
- [ ] 🌍 i18n (FR + EN both updated)
- [ ] 🚨 Breaking change (describe migration below)

## Checklist

- [ ] CI gates green (`npm run ci:pre-push` succeeds locally)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` updated
- [ ] If user-facing : screenshots / GIF added
- [ ] If new i18n strings : both `fr.json` and `en.json` updated (parity gate)
- [ ] If new component using `t()` : added test in `tests/components/`
- [ ] If new ApiClient method : added test in `tests/unit/services/api.test.ts`

## Test plan

<!-- How a reviewer can verify your change. -->

- [ ] Tested on light mode
- [ ] Tested on dark mode
- [ ] Tested with FR locale
- [ ] Tested with EN locale
- [ ] Tested signed-out + signed-in if relevant

## Screenshots (UI changes)

<!-- Before / After or just After. Mobile + desktop if responsive. -->

## Migration (if breaking)

<!-- For breaking changes : how existing users / data migrate. -->
